creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 171748
Switch version from 0.9.5 to 0.10.0 on multimedia/qmmp-plugin-pack

qmmp-plugin-pack version 0.10.0 has been released after qmmp-0.10.0
(bug 210523).  At this release, samplereate converter efffect plugin
is moved from qmmp package.

Since this update, SRCONV option is added.
